name: Vegetable Eggplant Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 med eggplant, peeled and finely chopped
1 can tomatoes, coarsely chopped, including juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy large pot over low heat, cook the garlic, onion, carrots, celery, eggplant, and turnip until they begin to soften, about 5 minutes.
2. Add stock or other liquid. Bring liquid to a boil over high heat and skim off any gray foam that rises to the surface.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until veggies are crisp-tender, about 7-10 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes and simmer 5 minutes longer.
5. Stir in herbs, pepper, and salt.
6. Serve and enjoy. Makes 10 servings. Per serving: 69 calories.
